conditions.benchmark_concurrency: one heavy benchmark process at a time
conditions.desktop_state: ordinary desktop applications remained open; no parallel ML benchmark process
conditions.swap_note: macOS retained swap from earlier quality runs; every isolated report records start, end, and delta, and no positive delta was observed

protocol.quality_process_policy: one implementation/language slice at a time; Whisper reused a loaded model across language slices
protocol.performance_process_policy: one new process per implementation/language; load, one cold run, five warm runs, then exit
protocol.performance_order: Original, FP16, INT8, INT6, INT4, Whisper large-v2, Whisper large-v3, Whisper large-v3-turbo; Russian, Kazakh, Kyrgyz, Uzbek within each implementation; Parakeet TDT 0.6B v3 Russian appended as a separately approved extension
